'''鈭歵-w-sh-v''' ('''katawshevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calefy|calefy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-w-sh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calefy|calefy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-w-sh-v
|-
! Lemma
| katawshevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitawshevoko|thitawshevoko]] || [[word:jitawshevoko|jitawshevoko]] || [[word:shitawshevoko|shitawshevoko]] || [[word:kitawshevoko|kitawshevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutawshevoko|thuthutawshevoko]] || [[word:jujutawshevoko|jujutawshevoko]] || [[word:shushutawshevoko|shushutawshevoko]] || [[word:kukutawshevoko|kukutawshevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutawshevoko|thutawshevoko]] || [[word:jutawshevoko|jutawshevoko]] || [[word:shutawshevoko|shutawshevoko]] || [[word:kutawshevoko|kutawshevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutawshevoko|thutawshevoko]] || [[word:jutawshevoko|jutawshevoko]] || [[word:shutawshevoko|shutawshevoko]] || [[word:kutawshevoko|kutawshevoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotawshevoko|thotawshevoko]] || [[word:jotawshevoko|jotawshevoko]] || [[word:shotawshevoko|shotawshevoko]] || [[word:kotawshevoko|kotawshevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotawshevoko|thotawshevoko]] || [[word:jotawshevoko|jotawshevoko]] || [[word:shotawshevoko|shotawshevoko]] || [[word:kotawshevoko|kotawshevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tawshevoko|th忙tawshevoko]] || [[word:j忙tawshevoko|j忙tawshevoko]] || [[word:sh忙tawshevoko|sh忙tawshevoko]] || [[word:k忙tawshevoko|k忙tawshevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatawshevoko|thathatawshevoko]] || [[word:jajatawshevoko|jajatawshevoko]] || [[word:shashatawshevoko|shashatawshevoko]] || [[word:kakatawshevoko|kakatawshevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatawshevoko|thatawshevoko]] || [[word:jatawshevoko|jatawshevoko]] || [[word:shatawshevoko|shatawshevoko]] || [[word:katawshevoko|katawshevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatawshevoko|thatawshevoko]] || [[word:jatawshevoko|jatawshevoko]] || [[word:shatawshevoko|shatawshevoko]] || [[word:katawshevoko|katawshevoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
